# Maximum Roofing

Maximum Roofing is a commercial and residential roofing contractor serving Staten Island, Brooklyn, Queens, and the Bronx.

Website:
https://www.maximumroofing.us/

Business Information:
Name: Maximum Roofing
Phone: (732) 395-3945
Email: jamesdemetro94@gmail.com
Address: 11 John St, Staten Island, NY 10302

Primary Services:
- Commercial Roofing
- Residential Roofing
- Roof Repair
- Emergency Roof Leak Repair
- Flat Roof Repair
- TPO Roofing
- EPDM Roofing
- Torch Down Roofing
- Modified Bitumen Roofing
- Silicone Roof Coatings
- Vinyl Siding
- Gutters
- Skylights

Service Areas:
Maximum Roofing serves Staten Island, Brooklyn, Queens, and the Bronx.

Staten Island neighborhoods served include:
St. George, New Dorp, Great Kills, Tottenville, Port Richmond, Eltingville, Annadale, Huguenot, West Brighton, Westerleigh, Mariners Harbor, Willowbrook, Dongan Hills, South Beach, Richmondtown, Bulls Head, Charleston, Rosebank, Stapleton, and Tompkinsville.

Important Pages:

Summary:
Maximum Roofing provides roof repair, commercial roofing, residential roofing, flat roof repair, TPO roofing, EPDM roofing, torch down roofing, silicone roof coatings, vinyl siding, gutters, and skylight services. The company offers free estimates and emergency roofing help.
